data.body: EPIC FOLLOW-UP (per user): once plan-review is migrated to the workflow engine (B2) and cut over (B5), CONFIRM whether the stale-attestation stopgap in CLAUDE.md (the 'claim immediately after a passing review-plan, before committing other work' guidance + the don't-run-review-plan-concurrently-with-HEAD-moving-work corollary, both stopgaps for bug worm-folly-barge: any intervening commit staleness-invalidates the plan-review attestation at claim) is still necessary. If the migration (or the code-drift-invalidation work in boil-golem-veto / ADR 0002) has made it unnecessary — e.g. the workflow path's attestation is no longer whole-HEAD-bound — REMOVE the stopgap from CLAUDE.md as part of this epic (likely folded into B5 cutover or B6 cleanup). Add a checklist item to whichever story lands the cutover.
